Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory O'Keeffe for Dena Copeland.

Mr. O'Keeffe stated that he will be filing a consent signed by Mr. Garret after today's hearing. The Court granted the Petition for Appointment of Successor Trustee (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
